glosses.ja: 私たちの; 私たちのもの

sentences.target: Unser Bus kommt gleich um die Ecke.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzɐ bʊs kɔmt ɡlaɪ̯ç ʊm diː ˈɛkə/

translations.de: Unser Bus kommt gleich um die Ecke.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzɐ bʊs kɔmt ɡlaɪ̯ç ʊm diː ˈɛkə/
translations.en: Our bus is coming around the corner soon.
translations.es: Nuestro autobús ya está a la vuelta de la esquina.
translations.fr: Notre bus arrive bientôt au coin de la rue.
translations.it: Il nostro autobus sta arrivando da dietro l'angolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的公交车快要从拐角处开过来了。
translations.yue: 我哋架巴士就快喺轉角轉出嚟。
translations.ru: Наш автобус скоро появится из-за угла.
translations.pt: Nosso ônibus logo vai virar a esquina.
translations.he: האוטובוס שלנו עוד מעט מגיע מהפינה.
translations.vi: Xe buýt của chúng ta sắp tới từ góc đường.
translations.nl: Onze bus komt zo de bocht om.
translations.uk: Наш автобус скоро з’явиться з-за рогу.
translations.hu: A buszunk mindjárt befordul a sarkon.
translations.hi: हमारी बस जल्द ही मोड़ से आ जाएगी.
translations.pl: Nasz autobus zaraz wyjedzie zza rogu.
translations.el: Το λεωφορείο μας θα φανεί σε λίγο από τη γωνία.
translations.nb: Bussen vår kommer snart rundt hjørnet.
translations.id: Bus kami sebentar lagi muncul dari tikungan.
translations.sv: Vår buss kommer snart runt hörnet.
translations.ro: Autobuzul nostru vine în curând după colț.
translations.cs: Náš autobus už je za rohem.
translations.da: Vores bus kommer snart om hjørnet.
translations.fi: Meidän bussimme tulee pian kulman takaa.
translations.ja: 私たちのバスはもうすぐ角を曲がってきます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'Bus'; agrees in case/number/gender with the head; part of the subject NP (NOM).
Head noun of the subject NP; masculine singular nominative.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present, expressing arrival/motion.
Adverb modifying 'kommt', indicating imminence ('soon/right now').
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the PP 'um die Ecke' (locative/directional).
Definite article, feminine singular accusative as required by 'um'; determiner of 'Ecke'.
Head noun of the PP object; feminine singular accusative.

translations.it: Mi piace la nostra piccola casa.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הבית הקטן שלנו.
translations.vi: Tôi thích ngôi nhà nhỏ của chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Ik vind ons kleine huis leuk.
translations.hi: मुझे हमारा छोटा घर पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει το μικρό μας σπίτι.
translations.nb: Jeg liker det lille huset vårt.
translations.sv: Jag tycker om vårt lilla hus.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi náš malý dům.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide vores lille hus.
translations.ja: 私たちの小さな家が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present, expressing liking.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Haus' in the object NP; agrees with neuter singular accusative.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Haus'; inflected for neuter accusative singular; describes size.
Head noun of the direct object NP; neuter singular accusative.

translations.es: Nuestro profesor lo explica otra vez.
translations.fr: Notre professeur l’explique encore une fois.
translations.it: Il nostro insegnante lo spiega di nuovo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的老师又讲了一遍。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅老師再解釋一次。
translations.ru: Наш учитель объясняет это ещё раз.
translations.pt: Nosso professor explica isso de novo.
translations.he: המורה שלנו מסביר את זה שוב.
translations.vi: Giáo viên của chúng tôi giải thích lại điều đó.
translations.nl: Onze leraar legt het nog een keer uit.
translations.uk: Наш учитель пояснює це ще раз.
translations.hi: हमारे शिक्षक इसे फिर से समझा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Nasz nauczyciel tłumaczy to jeszcze raz.
translations.el: Ο δάσκαλός μας το εξηγεί ξανά.
translations.nb: Læreren vår forklarer det en gang til.
translations.sv: Vår lärare förklarar det en gång till.
translations.ro: Profesorul nostru explică asta din nou.
translations.ja: 先生がもう一度それを説明します。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Lehrer'; nominative singular; part of the subject NP.
Head noun of the subject NP; masculine singular nominative.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes explaining.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as direct object (accusative), referring to previously mentioned content.
Adverb meaning 'again/once more'; modifies 'erklärt' to indicate repetition.

translations.vi: Đây là xe của chúng tôi.
translations.ja: これは私たちの車です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present, linking subject and predicate nominal.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Auto'; nominative singular within the predicate nominal.
Predicate noun (predicative nominative) after the copula 'ist'.
